bird.name: Campina thrush
bird.summary: The campina thrush (Turdus arthuri) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Guyana, Suriname…

locations.name: Charles Chubb (ornithologist)
locations.summary: Charles Chubb (31 December 1851 – 25 June 1924) was a British ornithologist.

locations.name: 杜伊達峰
locations.summary: 杜伊達峰（西班牙語：Duida），是委內瑞拉的山峰，位於該國南部亞馬遜州，處於杜伊達-馬拉瓦卡國家公園，海拔高度2,358米，山峰面積1,089平方公里。 參考資料 Frost, Darrel R.

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Campina thrush
relations.evidence: The campina thrush (Turdus arthuri) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Guyana, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Campina thrush
relations.evidence: It is also found in many widely scattered locations throughout Amazonian Brazil. The South American Classification Committee has at least one documented record in Bolivia, a location not mentioned in other sources. In Venezuela it is primarily found on Cerro Duida and Cerro Yapacana.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

relations.subject: Campina thrush
relations.evidence: | title =Birds of Venezuela | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =second | date =2003 | location =Princeton NJ | pages =712 | language =English }} In general it inhabits a variety of semi-open to open landscapes including light woodlands, mature secondary forest, disturbed areas, parks, and gardens
